airportTransfers.success: Your airport pickup request has been received. Our team will contact you shortly.

about.title: About Weego Travel
about.description: Egypt's premier transportation service. Safe, reliable, and comfortable travel. From Cairo to Sharm El Sheikh, from Alexandria to Siwa — we've got you covered.

safety.title: Safety First
safety.description: Rigorous vehicle inspections, professional background-checked drivers, and real-time trip monitoring.

fleet.title: Modern Fleet
fleet.description: Sedan, SUV, H1, HiAce & Coaster — from 3 to 28 passengers. All well-maintained and air-conditioned.

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.description: Always on time, every time. 8 hours of free waiting included with every booking.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How do I book a transfer?
faq.a1: Select your destination, enter your details, pick payment method, and confirm. You get instant confirmation.
faq.a2: Go & Return, 8 hours free waiting, professional driver, fuel, and door-to-door service. No hidden fees.
faq.a3: Free cancellation 48+ hours before trip. 50% refund (24-48h). 10% refund (<24h). No refund after trip starts.
faq.q4: How do I find my driver?
faq.a4: After booking assignment, you'll see driver's name, phone, photo, and vehicle in your dashboard.
faq.a5: Yes! Add a child seat during booking for 200 EGP.
faq.q6: Can I add WiFi to my trip?
faq.a6: Yes, 15-20 GB for 500 EGP, 30-40 GB for 1,000 EGP, or 70 GB for 1,700 EGP.
faq.a7: Sedan (3 pax), SUV (4 pax), Hyundai H1 (8 pax), Toyota HiAce 14-seater, Toyota Coaster 28-seater.
faq.a8: Yes! Corporate pricing with monthly invoicing. Contact weego@gmail.com for a custom package.

hero.title: Corporate Excellence

b1.title: Priority Booking & 24/7 Support

b3.title: Executive Fleet Access

rewardsPage.readyDesc: You have enough points to redeem a free internal flight or a 2-night luxury hotel stay.

steps.title: Book in 3 Simple Steps
steps.description: No hidden fees. No surprises. Transparent luxury from start to finish.

why.subtitle: We transcend transportation.
why.description: We transcend traditional booking platforms by prioritizing your experience. Clean design, robust security, and unparalleled support come standard.

r1.title: Secure & Reliable
r1.desc: Your data and payments are secured with industry-leading encryption protocols.

r2.title: Lightning Fast
r2.desc: Optimized for immediate responses, so you spend less time waiting.

r3.title: 24/7 VIP Support
r3.desc: We are always here to help you out, no matter where you are.

r4.title: Traveler First
r4.desc: Every feature we build starts with the traveler’s needs at heart.

t1.name: Eleanor F.
t1.content: WEEGO Black transformed our executive travel. The seamless integration of luxury cars, premium buses, and secure transfers is unparalleled.

t2.name: Marcus J.
t2.content: The loyalty program actually feels rewarding. I've been upgraded to suites twice this year just from my regular business trips.

t3.name: Sarah L.
t3.content: Coordinating travel for 50+ people used to be a nightmare until we partnered with WEEGO. Their B2B platform is a lifesaver.

corporate.title: Empowering global business ventures
corporate.description: WEEGO isn't just for vacations. Our dedicated corporate portal ensures seamless business travel management, exclusive B2B rates, detailed expense reporting, and dedicated 24/7 VIP support for your team.

fleetSection.description: Travel uninterrupted. From the tarmac to the boardroom, WEEGO Black provides a curated fleet of ultra-luxury vehicles and professional chauffeurs dedicated to your schedule.

f1.title: Luxury Vehicles
f1.text: Mercedes S-Class, BMW 7 Series, Range Rover.

f2.title: Armored Options
f2.text: Discreet high-security transport available on request.

f3.title: Availability 24/7
f3.text: Your personal chauffeur, ready whenever you land.

footer.description: Revolutionizing travel across the Middle East with tech-driven chauffeured experiences and premium bus trips.
